subject: english
learning_objectives: Recognise the participle forms treated in the note
Explain how the perfect constructions in the lesson are formed

sections.heading: Present Perfect Pattern
sections.content: The lesson links present participle work to present perfect forms built with has/have plus words such as written, done, and spelt: He has done it. They have ground the pepper.

sections.heading: Past Perfect Pattern
sections.content: The past perfect is formed with had plus forms such as written, done, and spelt: He had done the work before I came in. They had ground the pepper.
